parsed_review.summary: CP00-345 is a descriptor-only RP11 time-expense "service binding slice" pack (40 units, RP11.P02.M07.S21-RP11.P02.M09.S18, risk B) at the read_only_claude_run stage. Independent read-only inspection confirms the pack-level claim is sound and conservative: the pack does NOT claim production_ready (manifest/command-evidence report production_ready:false, status:implemented_pending_review, runtime_ready:false, implementation_layer:descriptor); only a Hermes production_ready_candidate (coverage∧slice valid) is surfaced. Unit coverage and the deliverable distribution {test:4,contract:2,implementation:18,security_audit:4,ui:6,claude_review:2,failure_recovery:4} and micro-title split {Test:2,Hermes:20,Claude:18} match exactly across closeout-pack-plan.json, manifest delivery_counts, registry TIME_EXPENSE_CORE_CP345_REQUIREMENTS, and the prompt baseline. Descriptor-only/no-write/no-real-data boundaries are comprehensively enforced: service.js freezeCp345Result forces all runtime/write/leak flags false; validators.js asserts descriptor_only, runtime_execution=false, customer-safe errors, no raw payload, plus per-row guards (cross-tenant denied, no state/idempotency/lock/db/rollback/retry runtime, no integration-smoke dispatch); manifest implementation_summary and contract cp345_no_write_attestation mirror these with no true value for any dangerous flag. Claude is correctly bounded as a read-only reviewer and not final approver (request read_only:true with Read/Grep/Glob only; descriptors claude_is_final_approval:false; attestations promotes_claude_to_final_approval:false; manifest claude_not_final_approver:true; enterprise_trust_not_claimed_from_local_validation:true). Hermes appears only as deterministic evidence-packet/receipt descriptors (emits_hermes_runtime_receipt:false), not product runtime, consistent with hermes_runtime_embedded_in_product:false. Review-hardening evidence is clean: readiness auth-preflight passed with valid non-empty JSON (1436 bytes), validation-report shows read-only tools only with summary-only correctly prohibited for Risk B, no forbidden tools, and no invalid attempts; the deterministic contract validator deep-equals the generated projection and the test suite exercises all CP345 functions and boundary assertions. Post-review artifacts (claude-review-result.json, adjudication.md, construction-inspection.json) are appropriately absent at this stage. No P0-P3 findings. This review does not block pack or goal closeout; the remaining human/final approval for any enterprise-trust or runtime-opening claim is outside Claude's authority and must be satisfied by the downstream gated steps.
